description: Shared hooks manifest mirroring the methodology home's settings.json hooks table. Carries matcher axis as data for cross-harness wiring (ADR-002 D2). The piEvent+toolNames fields are the pi-native translation of CC's event+matcher; no per-matcher code in the runner.

hooks.description: DCG (destructive-command-guard): blocks denied bash commands via dcg binary.
Block sensitive bash commands on pi bash tool calls.
Restrict access to sensitive file paths on pi read/edit/write tool calls.
CC lifecycle: re-prime the bead substrate context before compaction (bd prime). No pi analog — CC-only.
Brain-of-loop posture injection: pi before_agent_start hook appends orchestrator framing to the system prompt. CC analog: brain-of-loop.sh is part of the CC SessionStart hook bundle.
CC lifecycle: sync memory in, prime bead+cm context, run brain-of-loop on session start. No pi analog — CC-only.
CC lifecycle: sync memory out on session end. No pi analog — CC-only.
CC lifecycle: notify on stop. No pi analog — CC-only.
CC lifecycle: notify on permission request. No pi analog — CC-only.
